messages.text: On it. B2B customers reporting incorrect discount tiers applied at checkout. Checking recent changes.

messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Root cause: Off-by-one error in discount tier boundary check. Condition was cart.quantity > .... Rolling back.

messages.author: dave_patel
